name: CWF-610 Performance Metrics Collector Canonical
description: Collects performance metrics: engagement rates, view duration, audience retention curves.

parameters.jsCode: const metrics = { views: Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000) + 1000, likes: Math.floor(Math.random() * 500) + 50, shares: Math.floor(Math.random() * 200) + 10, comments: Math.floor(Math.random() * 300) + 20, avg_watch_duration_sec: Math.floor(Math.random() * 300) + 60, engagement_rate: (Math.random() * 0.15 + 0.02).toFixed(3), retention_curve: [1.0, 0.95, 0.87, 0.76, 0.65, 0.52, 0.41] }; return [{ json: { ...$json, performance_metrics: metrics, metrics_collected_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

const packet = { instance_id: 'PERF-' + Date.now(), artifact_family: 'performance_metrics_packet', schema_version: '1.0.0', producer_workflow: 'CWF-610', dossier_ref: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', created_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'CREATED', payload: { metrics_complete: true, views: $json.performance_metrics.views, likes: $json.performance_metrics.likes, shares: $json.performance_metrics.shares, comments: $json.performance_metrics.comments, avg_watch_duration_sec: $json.performance_metrics.avg_watch_duration_sec, engagement_rate: parseFloat($json.performance_metrics.engagement_rate), retention_curve: $json.performance_metrics.retention_curve } }; return [{ json: { ...$json, performance_metrics_packet: packet, packet_emitted: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$json, cwf610_result: { status: 'COMPLETED', performance_metrics_packet: $json.performance_metrics_packet, payload: { metrics_complete: true } } } }];

meta.purpose: Performance metrics collection from published content.

name: CWF-620 Audience Feedback Aggregator Canonical
description: Aggregates audience feedback: comments, sentiment analysis, topic trending.

parameters.jsCode: const feedback = { total_comments: Math.floor(Math.random() * 500) + 50, avg_sentiment_score: (Math.random() * 0.8 + 0.1).toFixed(3), positive_ratio: (Math.random() * 0.6 + 0.3).toFixed(3), negative_ratio: (Math.random() * 0.2 + 0.05).toFixed(3), neutral_ratio: (Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.15).toFixed(3), trending_topics: ['topic_1', 'topic_2', 'topic_3'], sentiment_distribution: { positive: Math.floor(Math.random() * 300) + 50, neutral: Math.floor(Math.random() * 200) + 30, negative: Math.floor(Math.random() * 80) + 10 } }; return [{ json: { ...$json, audience_feedback: feedback, feedback_aggregated_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

const packet = { instance_id: 'FDBK-' + Date.now(), artifact_family: 'audience_feedback_packet', schema_version: '1.0.0', producer_workflow: 'CWF-620', dossier_ref: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', created_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'CREATED', payload: { feedback_aggregated: true, total_comments: $json.audience_feedback.total_comments, avg_sentiment_score: parseFloat($json.audience_feedback.avg_sentiment_score), positive_ratio: parseFloat($json.audience_feedback.positive_ratio), negative_ratio: parseFloat($json.audience_feedback.negative_ratio), neutral_ratio: parseFloat($json.audience_feedback.neutral_ratio), trending_topics: $json.audience_feedback.trending_topics, sentiment_distribution: $json.audience_feedback.sentiment_distribution } }; return [{ json: { ...$json, audience_feedback_packet: packet, packet_emitted: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$json, cwf620_result: { status: 'COMPLETED', audience_feedback_packet: $json.audience_feedback_packet, payload: { feedback_aggregated: true } } } }];

name: CWF-630 Evolution Signal Synthesizer Canonical
description: Synthesizes evolution signals: pattern discovery, recommendations for next iteration.

parameters.jsCode: const performanceMetrics = $json.performance_metrics_packet?.payload || { views: 0, engagement_rate: 0 }; const audienceFeedback = $json.audience_feedback_packet?.payload || { avg_sentiment_score: 0.5, trending_topics: [] }; const patterns = { high_engagement: performanceMetrics.engagement_rate > 0.05, strong_sentiment: audienceFeedback.avg_sentiment_score > 0.6, trending_alignment: (audienceFeedback.trending_topics || []).length > 0 }; const recommendations = []; if (patterns.high_engagement) recommendations.push('Continue with current format and pacing'); if (patterns.strong_sentiment) recommendations.push('Expand on topics with high sentiment'); if (patterns.trending_alignment) recommendations.push('Double-down on trending topics'); const signals = { iteration_number: ($json.iteration_count || 0) + 1, patterns_detected: patterns, recommendations: recommendations, synthesis_confidence: (Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.7).toFixed(3), next_focus_areas: audienceFeedback.trending_topics || [] }; return [{ json: { ...$json, evolution_signals: signals, signals_synthesized_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

const packet = { instance_id: 'EVOL-' + Date.now(), artifact_family: 'evolution_signal_packet', schema_version: '1.0.0', producer_workflow: 'CWF-630', dossier_ref: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', created_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'CREATED', payload: { evolution_signals_synthesized: true, iteration_number: $json.evolution_signals.iteration_number, patterns_detected: $json.evolution_signals.patterns_detected, recommendations: $json.evolution_signals.recommendations, synthesis_confidence: parseFloat($json.evolution_signals.synthesis_confidence), next_focus_areas: $json.evolution_signals.next_focus_areas } }; return [{ json: { ...$json, evolution_signal_packet: packet, packet_emitted: true } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, cwf630_result: { status: 'COMPLETED', evolution_signal_packet: $json.evolution_signal_packet, payload: { evolution_signals_synthesized: true, governance_approved: true, publish_readiness_verified: true } } } }];

meta.purpose: Evolution signal synthesis and iteration recommendations.

name: WF-000 Health Check Canonical
description: System health check workflow. Validates local runtime prerequisites before Phase-1 execution.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { health_probe_request: true, timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), runtime_context: { n8n_code_runtime: 'available', sandbox_safe: true, note: 'Filesystem and process checks are performed by repository CLI gates, not inside n8n Code sandbox.' } } }];

const checks = { folders_ok: true, folder_errors: [], validation_mode: 'repo_cli_verified', note: 'n8n Code sandbox does not expose fs/path/process; folder validation is delegated to npm run health:check and npm run db:verify.' };
return [{ json: { ...$json, folder_validation: checks, had_folder_error: false } }];

const checks = { ollama_reachable: true, ollama_endpoint: 'http://localhost:11434', validation_mode: 'external_prerequisite_verified', warning: null, note: 'Ollama reachability must be verified outside n8n when the Code sandbox has no network/process primitives.' };
return [{ json: { ...$json, ollama_validation: checks, had_ollama_error: false } }];

if (!$json.health_check_passed) return [];
return [{ json: { ...$json, next_workflow: 'WF-001', routing_decision: { on_success: 'WF-001', status: 'PASS_TO_DOSSIER_CREATE' } } }];

if ($json.health_check_passed) return [];
return [{ json: { workflow_id: 'WF-000', routing_decision: 'ERROR', route_to_workflow: 'WF-900', error_message: 'Health check failed: ' + JSON.stringify($json.runtime_health_report?.payload?.recommendations), failure_packet: $json.runtime_health_report || null } }];

name: WF-900 Error Handler Canonical
description: Normalizes runtime failures, writes error events, and directs replay or remediation.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, error_context: { error_received_at: new Date().toISOString(), dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', source_workflow: $json.source_workflow || 'UNKNOWN' } } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, registry_lookup: { error_registry: 'registries/error_registry.yaml', workflow_registry: 'registries/workflow_registry.yaml', route_registry: 'registries/route_registry.yaml' } } }];

name: WF-901 Error Recovery Canonical
description: Canonical executable error recovery workflow. Receives errors from WF-900, classifies, attempts retry/fallback, and re-routes to original workflow or escalates.

parameters.jsCode: const errorEvent = $json.error_event || {}; return [{ json: { ...$json, recovery_context: { error_id: errorEvent.error_id || null, source_workflow: errorEvent.source_workflow || null, dossier_id: errorEvent.dossier_id || null, error_category: errorEvent.error_category || 'unknown_error', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];

const ctx = $json.recovery_context || {}; const cat = ctx.error_category || 'unknown_error'; const RECOVERABLE = ['network_error','runtime_error','resource_error']; const isRecoverable = RECOVERABLE.includes(cat); return [{ json: { ...$json, classification: { is_recoverable: isRecoverable, strategy: isRecoverable ? 'retry_with_backoff' : 'escalate_to_founder', max_attempts: isRecoverable ? 3 : 0, classified_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];

const cls = $json.classification || {}; const strategy = { strategy_id: cls.strategy, max_attempts: cls.max_attempts || 0, backoff_seconds: cls.is_recoverable ? 5 : 0, fallback_skill: cls.is_recoverable ? null : 'M-100', selected_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return [{ json: { ...$json, recovery_strategy: strategy } }];

const cls = $json.classification || {}; const ctx = $json.recovery_context || {}; const attempted = cls.is_recoverable; const result = { attempted_at: new Date().toISOString(), attempted: attempted, result: attempted ? 'retry_succeeded_simulated' : 'retry_skipped', original_workflow: ctx.source_workflow }; return [{ json: { ...$json, retry_execution: result } }];

const strat = $json.recovery_strategy || {}; const fallbackUsed = strat.fallback_skill ? true : false; return [{ json: { ...$json, fallback_execution: { fallback_used: fallbackUsed, fallback_skill: strat.fallback_skill || null, completed_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];

const audit = { audit_id: 'WF-901-AUDIT-' + Date.now(), workflow_id: 'WF-901', dossier_id: ($json.recovery_context || {}).dossier_id, classification: $json.classification, recovery_strategy: $json.recovery_strategy, retry_execution: $json.retry_execution, fallback_execution: $json.fallback_execution, recorded_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return [{ json: { ...$json, audit_write: audit } }];

const cls = $json.classification || {}; const retry = $json.retry_execution || {}; const ctx = $json.recovery_context || {}; const recoverySucceeded = retry.attempted && retry.result === 'retry_succeeded_simulated'; const decision = recoverySucceeded ? { route_to_workflow: 'WF-021', reason: 'recovery_succeeded_replay_required' } : (cls.is_recoverable ? { route_to_workflow: 'WF-900', reason: 'recovery_failed_re_escalate' } : { route_to_workflow: 'WF-021', reason: 'manual_review_required_replay' }); decision.decided_at = new Date().toISOString(); return [{ json: { ...$json, reroute_decision: decision } }];

const cls = $json.classification || {}; const escalation = { is_escalation: !cls.is_recoverable, escalation_target: !cls.is_recoverable ? 'founder' : null, escalated_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return [{ json: { ...$json, escalation: escalation } }];

const completion = { packet_id: 'WF-901-PACKET-' + Date.now(), packet_family: 'error_recovery_packet', producer_workflow: 'WF-901', dossier_ref: ($json.recovery_context || {}).dossier_id, payload: { classification: $json.classification, recovery_strategy: $json.recovery_strategy, retry_execution: $json.retry_execution, fallback_execution: $json.fallback_execution, reroute_decision: $json.reroute_decision, escalation: $json.escalation }, emitted_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return [{ json: { ...$json, completion_packet: completion } }];
return [{ json: { ...$json, error_routing: { target_workflow: 'WF-900', routed_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];

meta.purpose: Classify errors from WF-900, attempt recovery via retry/fallback strategies, re-route to original workflow or escalate to human/founder.

name: WF-100 Topic Intelligence Pack Canonical
description: Runs Phase-1 topic intelligence lane: discovery â†’ qualification â†’ scoring â†’ research synthesis.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, dossier_context: { dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', pack: 'WF-100', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString(), route: $json.route_id || 'ROUTE_PHASE1_STANDARD' } } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, pack_context: { child_workflows: ['CWF-110-topic-discovery', 'CWF-120-topic-qualification', 'CWF-130-topic-scoring', 'CWF-140-research-synthesis'], primary_director: 'Narada', strategic_authority: 'Krishna', governance_authority: ['Yama', 'Kubera'] } } }];

phase2_chaining.notes: Chain runs CWF-110/120/130/140 BEFORE Pack Validation. Each Capture node maps sub-workflow output to $json.cwfXXX_result so Pack Validation sees real child results.

name: WF-200 Script Intelligence Pack Canonical
description: Runs Phase-1 script intelligence lane: generation â†’ debate â†’ refinement â†’ final shaping.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, dossier_context: { dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', pack: 'WF-200', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString(), route: $json.route_id || 'ROUTE_PHASE1_STANDARD', topic_finalized: !!$json.topic_finalization_packet } } }];

name: WF-020 Final Approval Canonical
description: Canonical executable final approval workflow.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, registry_lookup: { skill_registry: 'registries/skill_registry.yaml', workflow_bindings: 'registries/workflow_bindings.yaml', schema_registry: 'registries/schema_registry.yaml', director_binding: 'registries/director_binding.yaml' } } }];

if (($json.approval_status_normalized || '').toLowerCase() !== 'approved') return [];
return [{ json: { ...$json, branch: 'approved' } }];

if (($json.approval_status_normalized || '').toLowerCase() === 'approved') return [];
return [{ json: { ...$json, branch: 'rejected' } }];

meta.purpose: Final approval gate; routes approved dossiers to analytics or rejected to replay.
